title: Full Circle
content: Last year I helped my parents set up a budget. First time in their lives they had one. My mom said: 'I wish we'd done this thirty years ago.' Full circle. That one hit different.
extended_content: Sitting at their kitchen table with a spreadsheet, watching my mom understand where their money actually went... it was everything. These are the people who sacrificed so much for me. And I finally had something to give back. Not money - systems. Tools. Knowledge. The same things I wished I'd learned earlier. Now they have them too.
when_to_tell: when discussing helping family with money
lesson: It's never too late to learn - or to teach
